name: setTimerCyclic
title: setTimerCyclic
syntax: void setTimerCyclic(msTimer t, long firstDuration, long period); // form 1
description: With form 2, firstDuration is implicitly the same as period, i.e. the timer runs precisely according to period the first time.
Starting of a timer that expires the first time 10 ms after the start of measurement and thereafter every 20 ms (10 ms, 30 ms, 50 ms, 70 ms etc.)
